aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — Mercury is unclear but your staging environment is on fire.
aries.prophecy: The stars say stay focused. Your IDE has crashed three times and it's 9am.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — The cosmos are quiet. Your rollback plan is not.
taurus.prophecy: The cosmos encourage slow, steady progress. Your ticket has been 'In Progress' for two weeks. It fits perfectly.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: No — Your deploy checklist has 14 items and you've completed 3.
gemini.prophecy: The universe offers clarity today. You have 11 browser tabs open. Clarity has been postponed.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: Maybe — Emotionally complex. Just like your Kubernetes config.
cancer.prophecy: The stars say nurture your energy. You have three PRs awaiting review and a 3pm retro. Energy is finite.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — The stars demand a grand entrance. Just tell Ops first.
leo.prophecy: The cosmos promise recognition today. Your most impressive commit is 'fix typo'. It will be noticed.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: Yes — Tests pass, lint is clean, the stars are aligned. This is the one time.
virgo.prophecy: The stars say trust the process. The process is a bash script from 2019 that nobody understands.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: No — Balance is key. The prod vs. staging configs are not even close.
libra.prophecy: The universe calls for balance. Your work-life ratio is currently 7:1. The universe means well.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: No — Something is lurking in the logs. Do not poke the logs.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say trust no one. This aligns perfectly with your approach to code reviews.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Maybe — You're going to do it anyway. At least write a rollback plan.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos say explore new horizons. There is a new framework. You will rewrite everything. Again.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: No — Your pipeline has 3 failing checks. The cosmos say not yet.
capricorn.prophecy: The stars reward discipline today. You will track your time, attend all meetings, and still get nothing done.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Yes — Oddly, today everything works. Push while the energy holds.
aquarius.prophecy: The universe says think outside the box. The box is a 10-year-old monolith. No one is allowed to touch the box.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You dreamed of a clean deploy. Dreams are not acceptance tests.
pisces.prophecy: The stars say dream big. Your sprint has 22 story points and ends Friday. Dream faster.
